meaning: n.联合国教科文组织(United Nations Educational,Scientific,and Cultural Organization)
examples: But UNESCO didn't even hold a vote.
UNESCO sees this as a terrible fact.
Two years ago, UNESCO put Italy on notice, saying the government was not protecting Venice.
It is noted that the completed application must reach UNESCO before 30 April of each year.
This month, UNESCO published its latest education report: Rethinking Education: Towards a global common good?
